name: Konfrut Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Konfrut Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells fruit and vegetable juice concentrates, fruit puree, and puree concentrates in Turkey and internationally. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Konfrut Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of D√É¬∂hler Gida Sanayi A.S.
